rulings.Case Title: TRACI GRACE VS. ALVIN BAUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Progressive Property Group, Inc. For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 23, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE PROPERTY GROUP, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Progressive Property Group, Inc. For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues In light of the opposition and new theories advanced by the Plaintiff coupled with apparent abandonment of some currently asserted claims (e.g. claims pertaining to unit 16), the Court will treat this motion as a Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings and will give Plaintiff a final opportunity to amend to allege viable tenancy-related novel claims arising out of purported tenancy-at-sufferance. Such claims must be made in good faith. It further appears that Plaintiff references a possible claim for breach of contract re: confidentiality agreement. If that is Plaintiff's intent, to assert an independent breach of contract cause of action, Plaintiff shall have leave to amend to so allege. Leave to amend is limited to any tenancy-related causes of action arising out of occupancy of unit 2 and breach of confidentiality agreement cause of action, if any. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRACI GRACE VS. ALVIN BAUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Alvin Baum For Summary Judgment And Alternate Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 23, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT ALVIN BAUM MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Alvin Baum For Summary Judgment And Alternate Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues In light of the opposition and new theories advanced by the Plaintiff coupled with apparent abandonment of some currently asserted claims (e.g. claims pertaining to unit 16), the Court will treat this motion as a Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings and will give Plaintiff a final opportunity to amend to allege viable tenancy-related novel claims arising out of purported tenancy-at-sufferance. Such claims must be made in good faith. It further appears that Plaintiff references a possible claim for breach of contract re: confidentiality agreement. If that is Plaintiff's intent, to assert an independent breach of contract cause of action, Plaintiff shall have leave to amend to so allege. Leave to amend is limited to any tenancy-related causes of action arising out of occupancy of unit 2 and breach of confidentiality agreement cause of action, if any. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 23, 2020 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT KEVIN DORGAN MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to September 28, 2020 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA ESTRADA VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 23, 2020 line3. DEFENDANT SALLY LIU DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to October 22, 2020 for Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than September 20, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NPA ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. DA LOU HUANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 23, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT KAI HE, JUN MA, SHA HUANG DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The Court notes that demurrer to the original complaint has also been unopposed. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SALVADOR TANDOC VS. OSCAR AVILA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 23, 2020 line 7. DEFENDANT TAMARA PEREZ DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address in good faith issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served within 5 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/CFH)
